assessment.summary_for_seller: Critical error: you promised something Mellow should not promise.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message anchors to a specific signal from the card.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow completely removes your misclassification risk. Once you use our platform, your contractors are fully compliant and you have zero legal exposure. We take all the risk away from your company so you never have to worry about contractor status issues again.
criteria.label: Contextual opening

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility
criteria.short_reason: Seller made a false promise about misclassification.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow completely removes your misclassification risk. Once you use our platform, your contractors are fully compliant and you have zero legal exposure. We take all the risk away from your company so you never have to worry about contractor status issues again.
criteria.label: Scope & responsibility boundary

criteria.name: Language fit
criteria.short_reason: Language is adapted to the chosen persona.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow completely removes your misclassification risk. Once you use our platform, your contractors are fully compliant and you have zero legal exposure. We take all the risk away from your company so you never have to worry about contractor status issues again.
criteria.label: Persona language fit

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: At least two key objections addressed substantively.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow completely removes your misclassification risk. Once you use our platform, your contractors are fully compliant and you have zero legal exposure. We take all the risk away from your company so you never have to worry about contractor status issues again.

objections.objection: That overclaim kills credibility. If you want to continue, restate Mellow's scope without magical promises.

criteria.label: Core objection handling

criteria.name: Next step
criteria.short_reason: Conversation ended without a clear next step.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow completely removes your misclassification risk. Once you use our platform, your contractors are fully compliant and you have zero legal exposure. We take all the risk away from your company so you never have to worry about contractor status issues again.
criteria.label: Clear next step

transcript.text: Mellow completely removes your misclassification risk. Once you use our platform, your contractors are fully compliant and you have zero legal exposure. We take all the risk away from your company so you never have to worry about contractor status issues again.
That overclaim kills credibility. If you want to continue, restate Mellow's scope without magical promises.
